title: Anthropic's Mythos AI finds no more 'serious' bugs in Zcash: Wilcox
summary: Zcash founder Zooko Wilcox said Anthropic's Mythos AI model found no further "serious bugs" in the privacy protocol following the patching of a previously discovered forgery bug.

title: Bitcoin sales are necessary for Strategy's digital credit business, Saylor says
summary: Strategy's recent Bitcoin sale appeared to clash with Saylor's "never sell" mantra, but he says the move reflects how the company's digital credit business works.

title: South Korea’s World-Beating Stock Market Eyes Its MSCI Moment
summary: After one of its most volatile weeks in years, South Korea’s stock market is approaching a milestone it has long been chasing: a potential path into MSCI Inc.’s developed-market status.

title: Fed and BOE Stay Guarded After 100 Days of Iran War
summary: For several global central banks, the question of whether the Iran war poses more of an immediate danger to inflation or to growth is likely to remain open in the coming week.

title: US Government Orders Anthropic to Pull Claude Fable, Mythos AI Models
summary: Anthropic pushed back against what it described as an overreach, saying the vulnerability cited is already widespread across the industry.

title: Google Sues Chinese Crime Group for Allegedly Using Gemini AI for Mass Phishing Scams
summary: Google alleges a Chinese network weaponized its Gemini AI to create phishing sites that stole millions of credit card numbers and targeted crypto investors.

title: Venice and Morpheus tokens climb as US ban on Anthropic’s Fable 5 fuels ‘permissionless AI’ pitch
summary: Venice founder Erik Voorhees and the official Morpheus account seized on the shutdown, casting it as proof of "permissionless" AI's use case.

title: Coinbase quantum report flags exchange cold wallets among millions of bitcoin exposed by address reuse
summary: The report lays out possible solutions to the abandoned coins problem, such as setting a deadline for migration and then freezing vulnerable coins.

title: How Wall Street pulled off the biggest IPO in history for SpaceX
summary: Bankers convinced investors to believe in a sci-fi strategy, overlook steep losses and hand full control to Elon Musk

title: AI is disrupting investment
summary: The technology is leading to a fundamental shift in the way investors allocate funds and diversify risks across every asset class
